title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
